items.title: Today only: Lenovo’s  2025 2K touchscreen 2-in-1 Chromebook Plus is 44% off at $349 all-time low
items.summary: Alongside its now-live Black Friday in July sale, and as part of its daily deals lineup, Best Buy is offering Lenovo’s 15.3-inch 2K touchscreen Chromebook Plus model for $349 shipped. This is regularly a $629 notebook, which is now seeing a $280 discount. We’ve previously seen some discounts on the 14-inch FHD variant of this Chromebook, which is currently sitting at $399, but this is the first time we’re tracking such a steep discount that takes nearly 50% off its usual going rate. Head below for more details.

items.title: Hackers stole ‘significant’ amount of data from tech firm relied on by thousands of US hospitals and pharmacies
items.summary: Edinburgh-based tech firm Craneware said customer data was stolen during a cyberattack. The company makes software that thousands of U.S. hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics rely on for billing patients, potentially exposing health data.

items.title: Chinese open models are proper competition that should be welcomed, not something to ban or treat as a danger, and open-sourcing is an old business strategy (Bill Gurley/Washington Post)
items.summary:
Bill Gurley / Washington Post:
Chinese open models are proper competition that should be welcomed, not something to ban or treat as a danger, and open-sourcing is an old business strategy  —  They aren't a security threat — they're what competition looks like.  —  Bill Gurley is the president and founder of the P3 Institute, and a former venture capitalist.

items.title: The Baseus X1 Pro solar security camera boasts AI recognition and tracking for two targets at once, and it’s now $130
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Baseus is offering its X1 Pro Dual-Tracking Wireless Solar Outdoor Security Camera down at $129.99 shipped. Down from a $270 full price, we saw discounts take the costs down the lowest during June’s Prime Day event, when it hit $120. We then saw it holding out at $140 since the event ended, which is now dropping another $10 in price for the second-best rate we have tracked – just $10 above the Prime Day low. The bundle for the camera with a 32GB microSD card has also dropped a bit lower to $152.99 shipped.

items.title: NVIDIA’s Jensen Huang’s Leather Jacket Has Been Auctioned Off For Nearly US$1 Million
items.summary:
Remember when we reported on NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s signed leather jacket being auctioned off at a starting bid of US$40,000 (~RM163,644)? Well, the auction at Sotheby’s has concluded, with the final bid reaching US$960,000 (~RM3,927,456). Let’s put that price in another context: for that amount, you could purchase about 240 GeForce RTX 5090 GPUs. […]
